entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
"Check my answer before giving yours."
"Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "Eman bertsio zailago bat nik saiatu ondoren."

entries.source: "Help me learn supply and demand"
"Keep it beginner friendly."
"Teach me financial modeling"
"Teach me Porter's Five Forces"
"Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "Erabili nire azterketako, proiektuko edo eguneroko bizitzako adibideak."

entries.source: AI prompts
Ask for a tiny first task.
End with a recap you write yourself.
For Interactive Instruction, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: Interactive Instruction-rako praktika-ziklo erabilgarria hau da:

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Modu honetarako, lana sinplea da: ikasi eginez, ikusiz, konparatuz, konponduz eta menperatzea frogatuz. Aplikazioak ikasgai-oihal bizi bat eraikitzen du zure helburuaren inguruan, irakaskuntza txat luze bihurtu ordez. Probatu: "Irakatsi finantza-modelizazioa."

entries.source: Foundations
Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: Prompt onek normalean hiru gauza dituzte: gaia, zure egungo maila eta nahi duzun laguntza mota. Ez duzu formulazio perfekturik behar. Saioa hasteko adina testuinguru besterik ez duzu behar.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: Erantzuna zabalegia iruditzen bazaizu, estutu. Eskatu adibide bat, uste oker bat, egiaztapen-galdera bat edo hurrengo urrats bat. Errazegia bada, eskatu erronka bat. Zaila bada, eskatu dagoeneko dakizunetik zubi bat.

entries.source: Interactive Instruction prompts and study loop
Make the output more useful
Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Interactive Instruction on inspir.
entries.value: inspir-en Interactive Instruction erabiliz ikaskuntza-emaitza erabilgarriak lortzeko prompt ideiak eta ikasketa-ziklo errepikagarria.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: AI erantzun bat irakurtzea ez da ikastea bera. Lehen erantzunaren ondoren, eskatu moduari ideiarekin zerbait eginarazteko.

entries.source: Related learning paths
Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Eskatu feedbacka ziurra sentitu ez den zatiari buruz.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
Start with one clear request
State the goal in one sentence.
study skills
That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: Azken laburpen hori garrantzitsua da. Ideia berriro azaltzen duzunean, zer den sendoa eta zer dagoen oraindik AIari mailegatuta erakusten duzu.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for interactive instruction with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Ikaskuntza-saio onenak moldagarriak dira. Modu hau interactive instruction-erako doituta dago, bere prompt, adibide eta ikaskuntza-fluxu propioekin.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Interactive Instruction is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Interactive Instruction-etik balioa lortzeko modurik azkarrena AIari ikaskuntza-lan bat ematea da, ez gai bat bakarrik. Gai batek zer interesatzen zaizun esaten du. Ikaskuntza-lan batek zer laguntza mota behar duzun esaten du.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Gero gehitu saioa pertsonalago egiten duen muga bat:

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
Turn the mode into practice

Use Interactive Instruction when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Collaborative Instruction. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Erabili Interactive Instruction lanerako modu egokia denean. Erlazionatutako bide bat nahi baduzu, probatu Collaborative Instruction. AI ikaskuntza-bloga ere araka dezakezu ikasketa-metodoak, ikaskuntza sokratikoa, ikasketa-txartelak, roleplaya eta gogoratze aktiboa ikusteko.
